name: CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal.CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes
summary: The CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes class contains the attributes for managing all the attributes of the curved dimension with orthogonal reference lines.

constructors.name: CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal.CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new curved dimension set orthogonal attributes instance which loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal.CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new curved dimension set orthogonal attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: attributeFilename
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: Arrowhead
properties.summary: The arrowhead attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: Color
properties.summary: The color of the dimension line.

properties.name: Format
properties.summary: The format attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: Placing
properties.summary: The placing attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: Text
properties.summary: The text attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: TrueColor
properties.summary: The true color (RGB enabled) of the dimension line.
